html:
2026-0596
2026-06-12GACSpecial Economic Measures ActRegulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to (1) add seven (7) individuals, thirty-four (34) entities and one hundred twenty-one (121) vessels to Schedule 1 of the Regulations and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs; (2) repeal subsections 8(3) and 8(4) to remove the requirements for a ministerial decision within 90 days of a delisting application and to notify applicants without delay of a decision taken; (3) repeal item 197 from Schedule 7 to remove the prohibition to export, sell, supply or ship articles for the conveyance or packing of goods; and (4) make non-substantive corrections to the various Schedules.Registration: SOR/2026-0122 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Special Economic Measures (Russia) Regulations in order to (1) add seven (7) individuals, thirty-four (34) entities and one hundred twenty-one (121) vessels to Schedule 1 of the Regulations and freezing their assets unless otherwise authorized by the Minister of the Foreign Affairs; (2) repeal subsections 8(3) and 8(4) to remove the requirements for a ministerial decision within 90 days of a delisting application and to notify applicants without delay of a decision taken; (3) repeal item 197 from Schedule 7 to remove the prohibition to export, sell, supply or ship articles for the conveyance or packing of goods; and (4) make non-substantive corrections to the various Schedules.
